name: SenesTech, Inc.
business: SenesTech develops and commercializes fertility control products for managing rodent populations, specifically rats and mice. Its products include ContraPest, Evolve Rat, and Evolve Mouse. The company targets pest management professionals, agribusiness, industrial, retail, and e-commerce channels.

exposures.sentence: Evolve Rat is also made from food ingredients with tolerance exemptions for both food and nonfood applications, which allows it to be used in agricultural applications.
Our current products focus on rat and mouse populations, and are known as: ContraPest, Evolve Rat, and Evolve Mouse.
Sales of Evolve Rat and Evolve Mouse increased across all major distribution channels, led by e-commerce, pest management professionals, and retail expansion.
